title: DeepMind's David Silver Raises $1.1B for AI Lab Ineffable Intelligence
summary: Ineffable Intelligence, founded by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has secured $1.1 billion in funding. The lab aims to develop AI that learns without relying on human data.
body:
Former DeepMind researcher David Silver has raised $1.1 billion for his new AI lab, Ineffable Intelligence. The British startup, founded just a few months ago, has achieved a valuation of $5.1 billion. The funding round was led by prominent venture capital firms, highlighting the growing interest in AI research that moves beyond traditional data dependencies.

The significance of this funding lies in Ineffable Intelligence's ambitious goal to create AI systems that can learn and improve without human data. This approach contrasts with current AI models that rely heavily on vast datasets curated by humans. If successful, this could revolutionize the field by reducing biases and increasing the autonomy of AI systems.

The future outlook for Ineffable Intelligence is promising, given the substantial funding and the expertise of its founder. However, the challenge of developing AI that learns independently of human data is immense. The lab's progress will be closely watched by the AI community, as success could set a new standard for AI development. The next steps will likely involve significant research and development efforts to achieve this groundbreaking goal.
twitterThread:
🚀 DeepMind's David Silver just raised $1.1B for AI that learns WITHOUT human data. Game changer?

Here's why this matters:
Current AI models rely on HUGE datasets curated by humans. Biases? Plenty. Ineffable Intelligence wants to change that.
The lab's valuation? $5.1B. In a few months. That's faster than most AI startups. Impressive.
Let that sink in. No human data = less bias. More autonomy. This changes everything for AI development.
Hot take: If Ineffable Intelligence succeeds, we're looking at the next big leap in AI. Watch this space.
standaloneTweet: David Silver, ex-DeepMind, just raised $1.1B to build AI that learns WITHOUT human data. This could redefine the future of AI. 🚀
